text.title: Immersive Design Principles Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when applying immersive-design-principles; each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Default movement is smooth at walking speed; ~40% of users report nausea by minute 10.
antipattern.fix: Default to teleport OR smooth-with-vignette; raw smooth behind comfort toggle.

antipattern.symptom: Spatial audio cue informs user of off-screen event; HoH users miss it.
antipattern.fix: Subtitles + visual indicator (arrow / minimap) accompany every audio cue.

antipattern.symptom: Experience requires standing for 30 min; users with mobility limits excluded.
antipattern.fix: Seated mode in settings; verify every interaction reachable seated.
